description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a natural brown finish. The upper section features a grid of open square shelves arranged in four rows and four columns, providing ample space for storage or display. The lower section consists of four cabinet doors, each with a vertical handle, likely concealing additional storage compartments. The back and sides are solid, with no visible openings or glass panels. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use in offices, libraries, or public urban spaces. The construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a smooth surface.
description: A large, brown wooden shelving unit with a grid of open shelves above and four cabinet doors below. It has a simple, sturdy design with vertical handles on the lower doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grid of open shelves and four cabinet doors with handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth and solid, flat side panel of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing the unit's depth and solid construction.
